description: Ground symbol — marks the 0V reference net on the schematic

pins.name: GND
pins.requirements: All GND symbols are electrically connected — same net

common_mistakes: Every component must share a common ground — a floating ground causes unpredictable behaviour
Digital GND and analog GND should be separate planes joined at one point to avoid noise coupling
Power ground (high current) and signal ground (low current) should use separate traces joined at supply
notes: The reference point for all voltage measurements. Every component in the circuit must connect back to GND.
